1.name: Attack Set
1.desc: Increases Attack. Requires at least 2 pieces to activate.

2.name: Defense Set
2.desc: Increases Defense. Requires at least 2 pieces to activate.

3.name: Life Set
3.desc: Increases Health. Requires at least 2 pieces to activate.

4.name: Critical Hit Set
4.desc: Increases Critical Hit Chance. Requires at least 2 pieces to activate.

5.name: Effectiveness Set
5.desc: Increases Effectiveness. Requires at least 2 pieces to activate.

6.name: Resilience Set
6.desc: Increases Resilience. Requires at least 2 pieces to activate.

7.name: Counterattack Set
7.desc: Increases Counterattack. Requires at least 2 pieces to activate.

8.name: Fortification set
8.desc: Reduces DMG taken from the first attack, but inflicts Speed Decrease for 1 turn. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

levels.p2_desc: damage taken decreases by 40% for the first 1 incoming attack (Removed when hit/Irremovable)\nDecreases the caster's Speed for 1 turn (Ignores Immunity/Irremovable)
damage taken decreases by 40% for the first 2 incoming attacks (Removed when hit/Irremovable)\nDecreases the caster's Speed for 1 turn (Ignores Immunity/Irremovable)

9.name: Mitigation set
9.desc: Reduces Crit DMG Taken. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

10.name: Lifesteal Set
10.desc: Increases Lifesteal. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

11.name: Penetration Set
11.desc: Increases Penetration. Requires at least 4 pieces to take effect.

12.name: Critical Strike Set
12.desc: Increases Crit DMG. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

13.name: Speed Set
13.desc: Increases Speed. Requires at least 4 pieces to take effect.

14.name: Bursting Set
14.desc: Generates Action Points at the start of battle. Requires at least 4 pieces to take effect.

levels.p4_desc: Gains AP at the start of battle +25

levels.p2_desc: Gains AP at the start of battle +15
levels.p4_desc: Gains AP at the start of battle +10

15.name: Revenge Set
15.desc: Increases Attack proportional to missing Health. Requires at least 4 pieces to take effect.

levels.p4_desc: Increases Attack proportional to missing Health
Increases Attack proportional to missing Health (Maximum efficiency at 50% Health)

16.name: Patience Set
16.desc: Increases Defense proportional to missing Health. Requires at least 4 pieces to take effect.

levels.p4_desc: Increases Defense proportional to missing Health
Increases Defense proportional to missing Health (Maximum efficiency at 50% Health)

17.name: Pulverization Set
17.desc: Increases damage dealt to targets in Break states. Requires at least 4 pieces to take effect.

levels.p2_desc: Increases damage dealt against targets inflicted with Break by 35%
levels.p4_desc: Increases damage dealt against targets inflicted with Break by 25%

levels.p2_desc: Increases damage dealt against targets inflicted with Break by 70%
levels.p4_desc: Increases damage dealt against targets inflicted with Break by 50%

18.name: Immunity Set
18.desc: Cannot be inflicted with debuffs for 1 turn at the start of battle. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

levels.p2_desc: Gain Immunity to Debuffs for 1 turn at the start of battle
Gain Immunity to Debuffs for 1 turn at the start of battle

19.name: Swiftness Set
19.desc: Increases speed proportional to missing Health. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

levels.p2_desc: Increases Speed proportional to missing Health
Increases Speed proportional to missing Health (Maximum efficiency at 50% Health)

20.name: Weakness Set
20.desc: Increases damage dealt to targets inflicted with a debuff. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

levels.p2_desc: Increases damage dealt against targets inflicted with a debuff by 25%
Increases damage dealt against targets inflicted with a debuff by 35%

21.name: Augmentation Set
21.desc: Increases damage dealt while under the effect of a buff. Requires at least 2 pieces to take effect.

levels.p2_desc: Increases damage dealt while granted a buff by 20%
Increases damage dealt while granted a buff by 30%

1001.desc: Striker: Increases the damage of single attacks proportional to the enemy's Health

1002.desc: Defender: Increases the Priority of the caster when attacking with a single attack

1003.desc: Ranger: Inflicts Burned when attacking with a single attack

1004.desc: Mage: Reduces the cooldown of the ultimate skill when an enemy is defeated

1005.desc: Healer: Heals one ally when Burst is activated

1006.desc: Striker: Increases Critical Hit Chance when performing an action

1007.desc: Defender: Grants a Barrier to the caster

1008.desc: Ranger: Inflicts Marked when attacking with a single attack

1009.desc: Mage: Inflicts Bleeding on all enemies when attacking with a skill that targets all enemies

1010.desc: Healer: Increases Defense of all allies when Burst is activated

1011.desc: Striker: Increases damage proportional to the caster's lost Health

1012.desc: Defender: Removes a debuff when performing an action

1013.desc: Ranger: Increases Critical Damage after making a Critical Hit

1014.desc: Mage: Increases damage proportional to the target's stats when attacking

1015.desc: Healer: Grants a Barrier to an ally when attacking with a single attack

1016.desc: Attacker: Increases damage dealt when Health is 70% or higher.

1017.desc: Defender: Reduces target’s Action Points when attacking

1018.desc: Healer: Reduces skill cooldowns when using a basic attack

1019.desc: Mage: Increases the damage of basic attacks

1020.desc: Ranger: Gains an additional turn upon attacking a single target

1021.desc: Striker: Reduces Speed and damage taken proportional to missing Health. Increases Counterattack Chance.

1023.desc: Healer: Increases the healing effect received by allies

1024.desc: Mage: Inflicts stun when attacking a single target

1025.desc: Ranger: Increases Speed after using a non-attack skill

1026.desc: Striker: Increases Critical Hit Chance when performing an action

1039.desc: Defender: Increases the damage dealt by allies proportional to Defense

1040.desc: Ranger: Increases Critical Damage after making a Critical Hit

1041.desc: Mage: Reduces the cooldown of the ultimate skill when an enemy is defeated

1042.desc: Healer: Reduces skill cooldowns when using a basic attack

1044.desc: Mage: Inflicts Bleeding on all enemies when attacking with a skill that targets all enemies

2001.desc: Striker: Grants Increased Penetration when hit

2002.desc: Defender: Counterattacks when an ally is attacked

2003.desc: Ranger: Increases the caster's Priority when an enemy is defeated

2004.desc: Mage: Increases Attack at the start of battle

2005.desc: Healer: Recovers the caster's Health when an enemy counterattacks

2006.desc: Striker: Increases Critical Damage when inflicted with a debuff

2007.desc: Defender: Increases the caster’s Priority Gauge when hit

2008.desc: Ranger: Increases Critical Hit Chance and Effectiveness at the start of battle

2009.desc: Mage: Increases Critical Hit Chance over time at the start of a turn

2011.desc: Striker: Increases Critical Damage proportional to lost Health

2012.desc: Defender: The caster receives a portion of damage suffered by allies

2013.desc: Ranger: Restores Health proportional to Max HP upon taking damage.

2014.desc: Mage: Increases Attack over time at the start of a turn

2015.desc: Healer: Removes debuff from the caster at the start of a turn

2016.desc: Striker: Increases the damage of non-Critical Hits

2017.desc: Defender: Gains Barrier at the start of battle

2018.desc: Healer: Reduces Critical Damage of the enemy at the start of battle

2021.desc: Striker: Grants a Barrier when counterattacking

2023.desc: Healer: Has a chance to reduce the wielder's debuff durations when an enemy takes an action

2024.desc: Mage: Increases the wielder's Priority when inflicted with a debuff

2025.desc: Ranger: Increases damage dealt by allies to boss enemies
